source:
#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
lake_db_name = "gold"
db_notebookname= "fact_electricity_import_export_gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#display(df2)

#Destination DataLake Storage Details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"]

settlement_cutover_date_string = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='settlement_cutover_date').collect()[0]["Value"]
settlement_cutover_date = spark.sql(f"SELECT to_timestamp('{settlement_cutover_date_string}', 'yyyy-MM-dd') as date_timestamp").collect()[0]["date_timestamp"]

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Gold_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Gold_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']
# Table: fact_electricity_import_export: START

#UTILS: Set table name

#drop_tablename="fact_electricity_import_export"

#UTILS: Drop table

#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{drop_tablename}""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{drop_tablename}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
#Set table name
db_tablename="fact_electricity_import_export"

#Create Gold Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
	FactElectricityImportExportKey STRING,
	DimMonthStartDateKey INT,
	DimSiteKey STRING,
	DimEmissionScopeKey STRING,
	GridImportMWh DECIMAL(20,6),
	ExportedGenerationMWh DECIMAL(20,6),
	GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e DECIMAL(20,6),
	RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage DECIMAL(20,6),
	CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashDiff STRING
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Read from silver applying filtering and aggregation logic to derive base measures
base_measure_df = spark.sql(f"""
--Filter the silver data to include only records related to CleanCo sites for ESG reporting
--Apply a window function to derive the latest version of electricity transaction records
WITH CTE_SETGENDATA AS
(
SELECT
    setgen.DUID,
    setgen.SettlementDate,
    setgen.PeriodId,
    setgen.VersionNo,
    setgen.StationID,
    CASE WHEN setgen.DUID IN ('BARRON-1','BARRON-2','KAREEYA1', 'KAREEYA2', 'KAREEYA5', 'SWAN_E', 'W/HOE#1', 'W/HOE#2') 
        THEN ABS(setgen.Energy_Sent_In_MWH) END as Energy_Sent_In_MWH,
    CASE WHEN setgen.DUID IN ('BARRON-1','BARRON-2','KAREEYA1', 'KAREEYA2', 'KAREEYA5', 'SWAN_E', 'W/HOE#1', 'W/HOE#2') 
        THEN setgen.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH END as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH,
    ABS(setgen.Energy_Sent_In_MWH) as Energy_Sent_In_MWH_Unfiltered,
    setgen.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH_Unfiltered,
    setgen.RecordSourceTableName,
    setgen.RecordSourceHashKey,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  setgen.DUID, setgen.SettlementDate, setgen.PeriodId ORDER BY setgen.VersionNo DESC) as RowId
FROM silver.market_electricity_transactions setgen
WHERE setgen.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
AND setgen.SettlementDate >= '{settlement_cutover_date}'
AND 
    (setgen.RecordSourceTableName = 'setgendata'
    AND 
    setgen.DUID IN
        (
        'BARRON-1',
        'BARRON-2',
        'KAREEYA1',
        'KAREEYA2',
        'KAREEYA3', --Included in _Unfiltered metrics
        'KAREEYA4', --Included in _Unfiltered metrics
        'KAREEYA5',
        'SWAN_E',
        'W/HOE#1',
        'W/HOE#2'
        )
    )
)
,CTE_SETCPDATA AS
(
SELECT
    setcp.TCPID,
    setcp.SettlementDate,
    setcp.PeriodId,
    setcp.VersionNo,
    setcp.StationID,
    ABS(setcp.Energy_Sent_In_MWH) as Energy_Sent_In_MWH, 
    setcp.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH,
    setcp.RecordSourceTableName,
    setcp.RecordSourceHashKey,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY setcp.TCPID, setcp.SettlementDate, setcp.PeriodId ORDER BY setcp.VersionNo DESC) as RowId
FROM silver.market_electricity_transactions setcp
WHERE setcp.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
AND setcp.SettlementDate >= '{settlement_cutover_date}'
AND (setcp.RecordSourceTableName = 'setcpdata' AND setcp.TCPID = 'QWIP')
)
,CTE_SET_ENERGY_TRANSACTIONS AS
(
SELECT
    seten.ConnectionPointId,
    seten.SettlementDate,
    seten.PeriodId,
    seten.VersionNo,
    CASE WHEN seten.ConnectionPointId = 'QWIP' THEN 'WIVENHOE' ELSE seten.StationID END AS StationID,
    CASE WHEN seten.ConnectionPointId IN ('QBGH1', 'QBGH2', 'QCBF1D', 'QTMW1K', 'QKAH1', 'QKAH2', 'QKYH5', 'QSWE', 'QWIV1', 'QWIV2', 'QWDR1W', 'QWLS1W', 'QWIP')
        THEN ABS(seten.Energy_Sent_In_MWH) END as Energy_Sent_In_MWH,
    CASE WHEN seten.ConnectionPointId IN ('QBGH1', 'QBGH2', 'QCBF1D', 'QTMW1K', 'QKAH1', 'QKAH2', 'QKYH5', 'QSWE', 'QWIV1', 'QWIV2', 'QWDR1W', 'QWLS1W', 'QWIP')
    THEN seten.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH END as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH,
    ABS(seten.Energy_Sent_In_MWH) as Energy_Sent_In_MWH_Unfiltered,
    seten.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH_Unfiltered,
    seten.RecordSourceTableName,
    seten.RecordSourceHashKey,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY  seten.ConnectionPointId, seten.SettlementDate, seten.PeriodId ORDER BY seten.VersionNo DESC) as RowId
FROM silver.market_electricity_transactions seten
WHERE seten.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
AND seten.SettlementDate >= '{settlement_cutover_date}'
AND 
    (seten.RecordSourceTableName = 'set_energy_transactions'
    AND 
    seten.ConnectionPointId IN
        (
        'QBGH1',
        'QBGH2',
        'QCBF1D',
        'QTMW1K',
        'QKAH1',
        'QKAH2',
        'QKAH3', --Included in _Unfiltered metrics
        'QKAH4', --Included in _Unfiltered metrics
        'QKYH5',
        'QSWE',
        'QWIV1',
        'QWIV2',
        'QWDR1W',
        'QWLS1W',
        'QWIP'
        )
    )
)
,CTE_CONSOLIDATED AS
(
SELECT
    setgen.SettlementDate,
    setgen.PeriodId,
    setgen.VersionNo,
    setgen.StationID,
    setgen.Energy_Sent_In_MWH,
    setgen.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH,
    setgen.RecordSourceTableName,
    setgen.RecordSourceHashKey
FROM CTE_SETGENDATA setgen WHERE setgen.RowId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT
    setcp.SettlementDate,
    setcp.PeriodId,
    setcp.VersionNo,
    setcp.StationID,
    setcp.Energy_Sent_In_MWH,
    setcp.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH,
    setcp.RecordSourceTableName,
    setcp.RecordSourceHashKey
FROM CTE_SETCPDATA setcp WHERE setcp.RowId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT
    seten.SettlementDate,
    seten.PeriodId,
    seten.VersionNo,
    seten.StationID,
    seten.Energy_Sent_In_MWH,
    seten.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH,
    seten.RecordSourceTableName,
    seten.RecordSourceHashKey
FROM CTE_SET_ENERGY_TRANSACTIONS seten WHERE seten.RowId = 1
)
,CTE_FILTERED AS
(
SELECT
    cc.SettlementDate,
    cc.PeriodId,
    cc.VersionNo,
    cc.StationID,
    cc.Energy_Sent_In_MWH,
    cc.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH,
    CASE cc.StationID
        WHEN 'BARRON' THEN 'BAR'
        WHEN 'KAREEYA' THEN 'KAR'
        WHEN 'SWANBANK' THEN 'SBK'
        WHEN 'WIVENHOE' THEN 'WIV'
        ELSE 'UNK' --Unknown Member
    END AS SiteCode,
    'ES2' AS EmissionScopeCode,
    d.YearMonthString
FROM CTE_CONSOLIDATED cc
INNER JOIN dimtables_gold.dimdate d on cc.SettlementDate = d.date
WHERE
cc.StationID IN 
    (
    'BARRON',
    'KAREEYA',
    'SWANBANK',
    'WIVENHOE'
    )
)
--Aggregate to grain of 1 row per Site per Month
,CTE_AGG_MONTH AS
(
SELECT
    agg.SiteCode,
    agg.YearMonthString,
    agg.EmissionScopeCode,
    SUM(agg.Energy_Sent_In_MWH) as GridImportMWh,
    SUM(agg.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH) as ExportedGenerationMWh
FROM CTE_FILTERED agg
GROUP BY
    agg.SiteCode,
    agg.YearMonthString,
    agg.EmissionScopeCode
)
--Assign surrogate keys in final df
SELECT
    dd.DateId as DimMonthStartDateKey,
    ds.DimSiteKey,
    es.DimEmissionScopeKey,
    dd.Date as DimMonthStartDate,
    agg.SiteCode,
    agg.EmissionScopeCode,
    agg.GridImportMWh,
    agg.ExportedGenerationMWh
FROM CTE_AGG_MONTH agg
INNER JOIN (SELECT YearMonthString,  MIN(DateId) as DateId, MIN(Date) as Date FROM dimtables_gold.dimdate GROUP BY YearMonthString) dd ON agg.YearMonthString = dd.YearMonthString
INNER JOIN gold.dim_site ds ON ds.SiteCode = agg.SiteCode
INNER JOIN gold.dim_emission_scope es ON es.EmissionScopeCode = agg.EmissionScopeCode

""")

base_measure_df.createOrReplaceTempView("tv_base_measure_df")

# Retrieve reference data for emission factors
ref_data_df_1 = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT
    ref.Dataset,
    ref.Code,
    ref.Description,
    ref.ValidFromDate,
    ref.ValidToDate,
    ref.NumericValue
FROM silver.reference_data ref
WHERE ref.Code IN ('EF7', 'EF8')
AND ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
ORDER BY ref.Description, ref.ValidFromDate
""")

ref_data_df_1.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_view_ref_data_df1")

# Retrieve reference data for RPP
ref_data_df_2 = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT
    ref.Dataset,
    ref.Code,
    ref.Description,
    ref.ValidFromDate,
    ref.ValidToDate,
    ref.NumericValue
FROM silver.reference_data ref
WHERE ref.Code IN ('RPP')
AND ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
ORDER BY ref.Description, ref.ValidFromDate
""")

ref_data_df_2.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_view_ref_data_df2")

# Prepare calculated measures using base measures, reference data and business rules
calc_measure_df = spark.sql(f"""
WITH PivotedEmissionFactors AS (
    SELECT
        ValidFromDate,
        ValidToDate,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Code = 'EF7' THEN NumericValue END) AS LocationBasedEmissionFactor,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Code = 'EF8' THEN NumericValue END) AS MarketBasedEmissionFactor 
    FROM temp_view_ref_data_df1
    GROUP BY ValidFromDate, ValidToDate
),
PivotedRPP AS (
    SELECT
        ValidFromDate,
        ValidToDate,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Code = 'RPP' THEN NumericValue/100 END) AS RPP
    FROM temp_view_ref_data_df2
    GROUP BY ValidFromDate, ValidToDate
)
SELECT 
    DimMonthStartDateKey,
    DimSiteKey,
    DimEmissionScopeKey,
    DimMonthStartDate,
    SiteCode,
    EmissionScopeCode,
    MAX(GridImportMWh) AS GridImportMWh,
    MAX(ExportedGenerationMWh) AS ExportedGenerationMWh,
    MAX(GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e) AS GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e,
    MAX(GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e) AS GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e,
    MAX(GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e) AS GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e,
    MAX(GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e) AS GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e,
    MAX(GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e) AS GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e,
    MAX(GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e) AS GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e,
    MAX(RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage) AS RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage

FROM
(SELECT
    bc.DimMonthStartDateKey,
    bc.DimSiteKey,
    bc.DimEmissionScopeKey,
    bc.DimMonthStartDate,
    bc.SiteCode,
    bc.EmissionScopeCode,
    bc.GridImportMWh AS GridImportMWh,
    bc.ExportedGenerationMWh AS ExportedGenerationMWh,
    CASE WHEN SiteCode IN ('BAR','KAR','SBK') THEN bc.GridImportMWh * ref.LocationBasedEmissionFactor ELSE NULL END as GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e,
    CASE WHEN SiteCode IN ('WIV') THEN bc.GridImportMWh * ref.LocationBasedEmissionFactor ELSE NULL END as GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e,
    CASE WHEN SiteCode IN ('WIV') THEN ( bc.GridImportMWh - bc.ExportedGenerationMWh ) * ref.LocationBasedEmissionFactor ELSE NULL END as GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e,
    CASE WHEN SiteCode IN ('BAR','KAR','SBK') THEN ( bc.GridImportMWh * (1 - refrpp.RPP) ) * ref.MarketBasedEmissionFactor ELSE NULL END as GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e,
    CASE WHEN SiteCode IN ('WIV') THEN ( bc.GridImportMWh * (1 - refrpp.RPP) ) * ref.MarketBasedEmissionFactor ELSE NULL END as GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e,
    CASE WHEN SiteCode IN ('WIV') THEN ( (bc.GridImportMWh - bc.ExportedGenerationMWh) * (1 - refrpp.RPP) ) * ref.MarketBasedEmissionFactor ELSE NULL END as GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e,
    CASE WHEN SiteCode IN ('WIV') THEN ( bc.ExportedGenerationMWh / bc.GridImportMWh ) ELSE NULL END as RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage

FROM tv_base_measure_df bc
LEFT JOIN PivotedEmissionFactors ref ON bc.DimMonthStartDate BETWEEN ref.ValidFromDate AND ref.ValidToDate
LEFT JOIN PivotedRPP refrpp ON bc.DimMonthStartDate BETWEEN refrpp.ValidFromDate AND refrpp.ValidToDate)

GROUP BY 
    DimMonthStartDateKey,
    DimSiteKey,
    DimEmissionScopeKey,
    DimMonthStartDate,
    SiteCode,
    EmissionScopeCode
ORDER BY 
    DimMonthStartDateKey,
    DimSiteKey
""")

# Assign to the standardised dataframe name source_sql_df
source_sql_df = calc_measure_df

# Convert HashDiff columns to STRING
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanGridImportMWh", col("GridImportMWh").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanExportedGenerationMWh", col("ExportedGenerationMWh").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanGridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e", col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanGridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e", col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanGridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", col("GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanGridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e", col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanGridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e", col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanGridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", col("GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e").cast("string"))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanRoundTripEfficiencyPercentage", col("RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage").cast("string"))

# Add CDC columns
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("FactElectricityImportExportKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey"), 256))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "CleanGridImportMWh", 
                                                                          "CleanExportedGenerationMWh", 
                                                                          "CleanGridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e", 
                                                                          "CleanGridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e", 
                                                                          "CleanGridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", 
                                                                          "CleanGridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e", 
                                                                          "CleanGridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e", 
                                                                          "CleanGridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e", 
                                                                          "CleanRoundTripEfficiencyPercentage"), 256))

source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#display(source_sql_df)

# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
source_sql_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_view")

# SCD2 logic
# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.FactElectricityImportExportKey = s.FactElectricityImportExportKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == 1
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = 0,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (FactElectricityImportExportKey, DimMonthStartDateKey, DimSiteKey, DimEmissionScopeKey, GridImportMWh, ExportedGenerationMWh, GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e, GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e, GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e, GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e, GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.FactElectricityImportExportKey, s.DimMonthStartDateKey, s.DimSiteKey, s.DimEmissionScopeKey, s.GridImportMWh, s.ExportedGenerationMWh, s.GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, s.RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, s.CDCOps, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.FactElectricityImportExportKey = s.FactElectricityImportExportKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == 1
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = 0,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (FactElectricityImportExportKey, DimMonthStartDateKey, DimSiteKey, DimEmissionScopeKey, GridImportMWh, ExportedGenerationMWh, GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e, GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e, GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e, GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e, GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.FactElectricityImportExportKey, s.DimMonthStartDateKey, s.DimSiteKey, s.DimEmissionScopeKey, s.GridImportMWh, s.ExportedGenerationMWh, s.GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e, s.GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e, s.RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, s.CDCOps, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Gold_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1 """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Gold_Update = Gold_Update_Post - Gold_Update_Pre
Gold_Insert = (Gold_Insert_Post - Gold_Insert_Pre) + Gold_Update
Gold_Delete = Gold_Delete_Post - Gold_Delete_Pre
Gold_ActiveRows = Gold_ActiveRecord_Post 
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_Insert,Gold_Update,Gold_Delete,Gold_ActiveRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

gold_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT 
	FactElectricityImportExportKey,
	DimMonthStartDateKey,
	DimSiteKey,
	DimEmissionScopeKey,
	GridImportMWh,
	ExportedGenerationMWh,
	GridImportGHGLocationBasedTCO2e,
	GridImportGHGLocationBasedFullPumpTCO2e,
	GridImportGHGLocationBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e,
	GridImportGHGMarketBasedTCO2e,
	GridImportGHGMarketBasedFullPumpTCO2e,
	GridImportGHGMarketBasedAuxLossOnlyTCO2e,
	RoundTripEfficiencyPercentage,
	CDCLoadDate,
	CDCStartDate,
	CDCEndDate,
	CDCOps,
	CDCCurrentFlag
FROM
    gold.fact_electricity_import_export
dedicated_sql_table_name = 'FactElectricityImportExport'

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
(gold_df.write
.option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
.option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{dedicated_sql_table_name}_staging"""))
.mode("overwrite")
.synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{dedicated_sql_table_name}"""))
# Table: fact_electricity_import_export: END
